title: Full Moon buffs creatures with Were in their name

card.rawText: All creatures with "Were" in their name gain: AL: +5. Hit Dice Rolls: +1. Atk Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.target: All creatures with "Were" in their name
effect.value: AL +5; Hit Dice Rolls +1; Atk Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Full Moon buffs creatures with Were in their name
plan.summary: Play Full Moon as field magic and verify a Were-named creature receives the printed AL, Hit Dice Roll, and Atk Dice Roll bonuses.

notes: Use Test Were Scout because its name contains "Were".

steps: Player 1 plays Full Moon as field magic.
Read the Were-named creature's effective AL and attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect the hit roll dice count.

expectedAssertions.label: Were-named creature attack dice increased by 1
Hit roll used three dice after the +1 Hit Dice Roll bonus
Full Moon remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm creatures without "Were" in their name do not receive this aura.
Confirm battle damage does not double-count the attack dice aura through both effective stats and battle suggestions.
riskNotes: This fixture validates positive Were-name targeting and direct stat outputs; damage double-counting needs a separate adapter pass.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Full Moon field aura for Were-named creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
